message:
feat(ollama): add model management CLI, pull progress streaming, and model deletion

Three interconnected features for local Ollama model management:

1. New `ntm models` subcommand (internal/cli/models.go, 526 lines):
   - `ntm models list` — tabular or JSON listing of local models with size,
     family, parameter count, and modification time
   - `ntm models pull <name>` — download models with real-time progress bar
     showing digest, bytes transferred, and percentage
   - `ntm models rm <name>` — delete local models with confirmation prompt
   - `ntm models recommend` — VRAM-aware recommendations using tiered bands
     (0-4GB, 4-8GB, 8-16GB, 16GB+) with nvidia-smi detection
   - `ntm models search <query>` — search Ollama library via web scraping
   - All commands support --json output for robot-mode consumption
   - Disk space warnings when available storage drops below 5GB threshold

2. Ollama adapter API extensions (adapter.go):
   - PullModelWithProgress(ctx, name, onProgress) — streams ModelPullProgress
     structs with status, digest, total/completed bytes, and done flag
   - DeleteModel(ctx, name) — DELETE /api/delete with proper error wrapping
   - ModelPullProgress struct for structured progress reporting
   - Original PullModel() now delegates to PullModelWithProgress(nil)

3. Spawn integration (spawn.go):
   - preflightOllamaSpawn() now shows live pull progress in interactive mode
     via newOllamaPullProgressPrinter(), suppressed in JSON output mode

4. CLI registration (root.go):
   - Wire newModelsCmd() into root command's subcommand list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
